prompt: Create a polished full-body anime game character standing pose on a clean white background, featuring an elegant adult woman with icy light blue short layered bob hair, long side bangs, and a small dangling earring. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered soft gray square blur, while the rest of the design remains highly detailed. She wears a fitted gothic-fantasy formal dress in black and deep sapphire blue: a high-neck bodice with a sculpted corset waist, long flared sleeves, a short front skirt, and a long split tailcoat-like overskirt that opens in the front and falls behind her calves. Decorate the outfit with ornate silver trim, thorn-like metallic filigree, star-shaped accents, blue crystal gems at the chest, waist, sleeves, and shoes, plus a small chain pendant hanging from the waist. Add sheer dark stockings and glossy black pointed high heels with ankle straps and matching blue gemstone ornaments. Pose her gracefully with one hand raised near her collarbone, the other hand relaxed outward, legs crossed in a refined stance. Use clean high-end visual novel character art, crisp linework, soft cel shading, glossy highlights, delicate fabric folds, subtle translucent blue inner lining with faint floral patterns, elegant proportions, and a premium fantasy RPG heroine design.
